summary: Plan only. Representative #82876 is already closed and is explicitly listed by the job as a security-signal ref, so it is routed without any close/comment/label mutation. actions.reason: The job explicitly scopes #82876 as a security-signal item for central handling; route only this item and do not let it block unrelated non-security classification.
